items.name: Coral Wand
items.description: This piece of coral has been enchanted with magical properties.

items.name: Priest's Holy Symbol
items.description: This totem gives off divine powers.

items.name: Bogwater Crystal
items.description: The crystal in this wooden wand is gray and murky with faint traces of a sickly green, opalescent luminance.

items.name: Deer Horn
items.description: The horn of a rare and magical deer blessed by the forest.

items.name: Quartz Dice
items.description: These dice, carved from quartz, have been enchanted to manipulate the fates in small ways.

items.name: Agate Encrusted Stone
items.description: A stone that shines with magical energies.

items.name: Amber Encrusted Stone
items.description: A glowing stone that shines bright amber.

items.name: Amethyst Encrusted Stone
items.description: A stone that glows a pale reddish-purple.

items.name: decayed opal wand
items.description: A very fragile wand that still has magical power.

items.name: Decayed Opal Wand
items.description: A very fragile wand that still has magical power.

items.name: Fernlite Wand
items.description: This light wooden wand bears impressions of fern leaves that glow silver. The orb radiates the same silver.

items.name: old bloodstone
items.description: A bloodstone that gives off an eerie red glow.

items.name: Old Bloodstone
items.description: A bloodstone that gives off an eerie red glow.

items.name: Driftwood Totem
items.description: A magical totem.

items.name: Malgrim's Study Guide
items.description: The enchanter Malgrim insists that this guide will make you a better spellcaster.

items.name: Priest's Holy Stone
items.description: The sacred stone of a cult long forgotten.

items.name: Coral Totem
items.description: A magical totem made of coral.

items.name: Nightshire Crystal
items.description: The wand itself is made of a pure black wood-like substance, that shines the same opalescent azure as the crystal it holds.

items.name: Bright Shining Orb
items.description: A totem that brightens the room.

items.name: Amber Polyhedron
items.description: A strange amber carving resembling a die of many faces. A tiny rune decorates each of its 20 sides.

items.name: Boglite Wand
items.description: This darkwood wand bears a crystal that radiates a faint sickly green glow.

items.name: Green Globe of Living
items.description: The physical embodiment of the forest.

items.name: Opal Polyhedron
items.description: A strange opal carving resembling a die of many faces. A tiny rune decorates each of its 20 sides.

items.name: Book of Foundations
items.description: A book that focuses on the power of divine wisdom.

items.name: Book of Nature's Blessing
items.description: A book that teaches the arts of wilderness lore.

items.name: Book of Tribal Teachings
items.description: A book that teaches the ways of the ancient races.

items.name: Miner's Bloodstone
items.description: An object that bears a scratch from a pickaxe.

items.name: Miner's Emerald
items.description: A fine gem that was found to have magical powers.

items.name: Miner's Ruby
items.description: A blood red stone that seems to have been special to the previous owner.

items.name: Miner's Topaz
items.description: A yellow gem that shines bright as the sun's rays when light passes through it.

items.name: Scalebound Tome
items.description: Book bound in serpent scales. It appears to be written in an ancient lizardman language.

items.name: book of alchemical symbols
items.description: A book of alchemical symbols.

items.name: Brittle Starfyre Wand
items.description: The ore comprising this item was discovered by accident during the experiments of a gnome wizard who kept his findings secret.

items.name: magic book
items.description: A book filled with magic.

items.name: magic totem
items.description: A totem glowing with magic.

items.name: Mystical Tome
items.description: This tome is filled with magic.

items.name: Tome of Magic
items.description: The secrets of this tome will provide any caster with the extra power they need.

items.name: Hardened Kelp Wand
items.description: A magical wand.

items.name: Quakestone Orb
items.description: This orb was forged by a civilization that dwelled in the mountains and gave dire respect to the power of the earth's tremors.

items.name: Wand of Astral Mist
items.description: This wand is enshrouded in a faint aura of iridescent silvery mist.

items.name: Brittle Starwynd Wand
items.description: The starwynd wand was created by a group of benevolent gnome enchanters that fought the evil forces of the Underfoot.

items.name: Deluged Totem
items.description: A magical totem.

items.name: Shandaulin's Journal
items.description: One of many journals written by the famous druid traveler, Shandaulin.

items.name: Frostbound Tome
items.description: Magical tome that contains arctic lore. It is cold to the touch.

items.name: Icebear Fetish
items.description: A magical relic of a long lost tribe of tundra nomads, it was probably carried by a prominent shaman.

items.name: Wand of Necis
items.description: A magic wand created for the sorcerer Necis.

items.name: Dilian's Compendium
items.description: A magical compendium of lore compiled by the famed enchanter Dilian Sortos.

items.name: Tome of Illusion
items.description: A magical tome, it contains many secrets and insights into the art of illusion.

items.name: Blue Forest Orb
items.description: A mysterious orb found ages ago in an ancient forest. This orb glows a pale blue.

items.name: Ebony Moon Totem
items.description: A mystic totem used by many inhabitants of the darker forests of Norrath.

items.name: Red Forest Orb
items.description: A mysterious orb found ages ago in an ancient forest. This orb burns brightly with a fiery red.

items.name: Totem of Desert Witchcraft
items.description: This is a magical totem.

items.name: Yellow Forest Orb
items.description: A mysterious orb found ages ago in an ancient forest. It shines as brightly as the sun does with yellow streaks all around it.

items.name: Bloodthirsty Totem
items.description: The handle of this evil totem cuts those that hold this vile monstrosity. It feeds off the life force of those that wield it.

items.name: Clay Totem
items.description: This totem is made completely of clay.

items.name: Glowing Starwynd Wand
items.description: The starwynd wand was created by a group of benevolent gnome enchanters that fought the evil forces of the Underfoot.

items.name: Mirebone Totem
items.description: This ancient totem is made of bone fragments and earthen ores melded together. Runes have been inscribed upon the bone shards.

items.name: Radiant Totem
items.description: This totem is radiating a soft white light.

items.name: Tidian Totem
items.description: The tidian tribe made this totem.

items.name: Blackmail Manual
items.description: When the owner wishes it, the pages of this magical tome fill with the dark secrets of their enemies.

items.name: Book of Logic
items.description: Practical logic is a key element in understanding the ways of sorcery.

items.name: Ebb Wand
items.description: A magic wand.

items.name: Totem of the Brute
items.description: A magical totem crafted by a primitive tribe. The image of a brute is carved into the wood.

items.name: Beaming Book
items.description: This book is beaming with a soft white light.

items.name: Coldfire Grimoire
items.description: A magical leatherbound tome. Its cover shows a frozen ball of fire.

items.name: Crude Stone Wand
items.description: A crudely made wand crafted from granite.

items.name: Protectorate's Book
items.description: This book seems to have some symbol on it that is not familiar.

items.name: Tome of Ancient Yore
items.description: This ancient tome speaks of many magical wonders and the glory of days passed.

items.name: Torrent Totem
items.description: A magical totem.

items.name: Greetaa
items.description: This totem was crafted from the items you found on your journey.

items.name: Wand of Blunder
items.description: This wand is the resultant failure of an unknown enchanter's attempt to craft a wondrous artifact of power.

items.name: Butterfly Totem
items.description: A carved crystal butterfly decorates this powerful and enchanting totem.

items.name: Confluent Totem
items.description: A magical totem.

items.name: Tome of Malignance
items.description: This decaying tome contains ancient curses and incantations. Its power is equal only to its stench.

items.name: Transcendent Orb
items.description: This orb seems too beautiful to be real. You can feel its power just being near it.

items.name: Arctic Writ
items.description: A magical writ of arctic lore.

items.name: Blessed Book
items.description: This book has a sense of divine power.

items.name: Diamondmind Rod
items.description: Merely possessing this rod instills clarity beyond the comprehension of layfolk.

items.name: Dire Rat Hide Totem
items.description: Rat hides are wrapped around the base of this totem.

items.name: Eagreborn Totem
items.description: A magical totem.

items.name: Elder Starwynd Wand
items.description: The starwynd wand was created by a group of benevolent gnome enchanters that fought the evil forces of the Underfoot.

items.name: Pine Coated Charm
items.description: This charm has finely placed pine needles all around it.

items.name: Totem of Sand Stone
items.description: This is a magical totem.

items.name: Brine Wand
items.description: A magic wand.

items.name: Mudstained Tome
items.description: This tome once remained buried beneath the southern plains for ages.

items.name: Snakescale Tome
items.description: The cover of this book is made of snake scales.

items.name: Tome of Stone
items.description: A petrified book that bears enchanted runes on it.

items.name: Polyhedral Sphere
items.description: This dimensionally multifaceted sphere offers protection from all elements.

items.name: Writ Arcana
items.description: A magical tome of arcane lore, there are said to only be a handful of copies still in existence.

items.name: Abysmal Totem
items.description: Terrifying heads have been crafted into the sides of this totem.

items.name: Captain's Charm
items.description: A magic totem.

items.name: Incandescent Book
items.description: This book is glowing with a white light. You can feel the power of this item just being near it.

items.name: Oceanborn Wand
items.description: A magic wand.

items.name: Silver Beaded Charm
items.description: These beads tie around your wrist and offer some magical benefits.

items.name: Wisdom Deity
items.description: A small totem from the nymphs. It seems to glow a bright blue.

items.name: Ancient Starwynd Wand
items.description: The starwynd wand was created by a group of benevolent gnome enchanters that fought the evil forces of the Underfoot.

items.name: Darkened Crystalline Totem
items.description: The hands of a corrupt and dark force crafted this totem.

items.name: Incandescent Orb
items.description: This orb is glowing with a white light. You can feel the power of this item just being near it.

items.name: Murkwood Totem
items.description: This odd totem was carved many years ago from an ancient swamp tree.

items.name: Musty Tome
items.description: This crusty old tome crackles with power.

items.name: Totem of the Stormwatcher
items.description: Ancient elven mystics that sought to share in the power of the storm forged these ancient totems.

items.name: Aurabound Book
items.description: This book is bound in a light blue aura. Its power can be felt when held.

items.name: Bloodshade Totem
items.description: The mad dark elven necromancer Nuaine Bloodshade used her own essence to create powerful artifacts.

items.name: Book of Remembrance
items.description: An ancient book written in a long forgotten tongue. Just looking at the symbols on the pages fills your mind with insight.

items.name: Cotidal Wand
items.description: A magic wand.

items.name: Divine Book
items.description: No mere mortal may look upon this book without first forsaking his or her spirit.

items.name: Eye of Naurticus
items.description: The eye of the ancient kraken, Naurticus still retains some of his power.

items.name: Rallosian Totem
items.description: These totems were crafted by the ogre seer, Korgraugh, and were once wielded by the empire's mightiest priests and mystics.

items.name: Rallosian War Totem
items.description: This war totem, forged and enchanted by ogre war priests of the Rallosian Empire, bears an aura of great power.

items.name: Starfire Wand
items.description: A glowing divine wand that resembles an exploding star.

items.name: Zoaran Totem
items.description: A powerful divine totem dedicated to the spirits of barren lands.

items.name: Benthic Totem
items.description: A magical totem

items.name: Reshzum's Wand
items.description: A powerfully enchanted magical wand once belonging to the dread necromancer Reshzum.

items.name: Sheen Blue Totem
items.description: This totem has a dull blue shimmer to it.

items.name: Visionwalkers Totem
items.description: A powerfully enchanted magical totem; it is a beacon of shamanistic power.

items.name: Wand of Dedication
items.description: A magical wand, it is a symbol of religious fervor.

items.name: Enoob's Eye
items.description: The eye of a rare and powerful cyclops.

items.name: Goblin Bone Totem
items.description: This totem was forged by a goblin necromancer who slew the chief of his clan.

items.name: Orb of Planar Winds
items.description: This orb was held by the magician Euvariel, who brought down a league of a thousand Rallosian soldiers upon the southern plains.

items.name: Rallosian Imperial Orb
items.description: Wielded by the Rallosian Empire's most fearsome necromancers, this orb continues to radiate a dark energy.

items.name: Rallosian Orb of Power
items.description: Forged for the imperial mages of the Rallosian Empire, this orb holds a great power and bears the mark of destruction and chaos

items.name: Twig of Life
items.description: This once mundane twig has been imbued with the spirits of nature.

items.name: Painted Totem
items.description: This powerful totem is painted with the sacred pigments of an ancient kobold tribe.

items.name: totem of the frozen north
items.description: An ancient shamanistic spirit totem made of diamonds and stone.

items.name: Orb of the Void
items.description: An orb that seems to gain strength from its wielder.

items.name: Wyrmwing Totem
items.description: This tiny totem is made from wyrm wings.

items.name: book of disease
items.description: This book carries information on various diseases.

items.name: Ancient Rhino Horn
items.description: An enchanted horn taken from the corpse of an ancient rhino.

items.name: Thantonian Crosier
items.description: A magical staff branded with the heraldric symbol of the ancient Thantonians.

items.name: Fireworm Totem
items.description: This tiny totem is made from a fireworm hide.

items.name: Gregarcian Totem
items.description: This totem was made for Gregarcian.

items.description: A simple recruit's shield.

items.description: A light shield constructed of heavy cloth and wood.

items.description: This shield is dented but seems to have some inner power to it.

items.description: This shield has seen many better days.

items.description: This wooden shield has been reinforced with iron bands for added protection.

items.description: A large kite shield once held by an orcish explorer.

items.name: Rock Encrusted Shield
items.description: This shield has been encrusted with tiny rocks to add to its defensive properties.

items.name: Fernlite Protector
items.description: This shield is decorated with ancient impressions of fern leaves that glow with a silver light at their edges.

items.name: Hallowed Shield
items.description: This shield is in good condition for being battle worn.

items.name: Pinewood Defender
items.description: A magical wooden shield.

items.name: Rosebriar Shield
items.description: A simple wooden shield bearing a rosebush pattern upon its front.

items.description: A simple, yet sturdy shield of iron.

items.name: Brilliant Shield
items.description: This shield shines as bright as the sun.

items.description: This bronze shield has a simple pattern carved in its edges. A greenish brown moss grows in these carvings.

items.description: A magical armguard.

items.name: Shield of Green Hues
items.description: A green shield of mass power.

items.name: Sunsteel Shield
items.description: A fine shield forged by the centaurs of the southern plains, crafted from sunsteel.

items.name: Sylvan Shield
items.description: This shield was crafted by the elves of old to protect their priests from the weapons of their enemies.

items.name: Driftwood Shield
items.description: A shield made from driftwood.

items.name: Miner's Shield
items.description: An old shield that seemed to provide some defense from thieves.

items.name: Pious Shield
items.description: This shield seems to carry a divine favor.

items.name: Ridgefyre Crested Shield
items.description: This ornately carved shield bears intricate designs of a brilliant golden ore that bears an opalescent shimmer.

items.name: steel targe
items.description: A well made round shield forged of high quality steel.

items.description: This limestone-plated shield is as hard as steel. The limestone plates bear ancient runes that are soiled with swamp-growth.

items.description: This crimson-black shield bears a woven design of obsidian and silver around its edges.

items.description: A magical heater crafted from frostwood pine.

items.name: Giant Crab Shell
items.description: The shell of a giant crab makes a formidable shield.

items.name: Swampstone Hide Shield
items.description: This reptilian-hide shield is plated in shale that bears ancient runic carvings.

items.description: A massive shield forged on the cold northern planes.

items.name: Old Elven War Shield
items.description: This shield was crafted by the elves when they ruled over all the forests of Tunaria.

items.name: Pyrohide Shield
items.description: A magical shield crafted from the hide of a desert beast.

items.name: Blood Iron Shield
items.description: The iron ore that this shield is forged from bears tiny glowing red veins of an unidentifiable substance.

items.description: A magical armor guard that is resistant to cold.

items.name: footman's heater
items.description: A well made round shield forged of steel.

items.description: A superbly crafted heater made from mithron, an alloy of iron and mithril.

items.description: A magical shield emblazoned with the symbol of an unknown barbarian tribe.

items.name: Windbind Shield
items.description: A magical shield, it holds several powerful life enchantments.

items.description: A magical shield, it is surpassingly durable and offers great protection.

items.description: A magical kite shield, it has many stars etched onto it.

items.name: Akessan Kite Shield
items.description: A sturdy enchanted kite shield once used by the Akessan.

items.description: A magical kite shield, it provides great protection.

items.name: Sunglade Round Shield
items.description: A shield made of strong greenish leather stretched over a sturdy wooden frame.

items.description: A tower shield crafted by a once mighty orc horde.

items.description: An imposing shield that protects the bearers mind and body.

items.name: Black Wool Shield
items.description: This shield is made with fine black wool inserts.

items.name: fungi covered kite shield
items.description: A fragile shield covered with a plantlike fungus.

items.name: Shield of Fluctuating
items.description: This shield will protect you from some forms of magic.

items.description: An ancient shield from an old civilization

items.name: Dark Emblem of Hate
items.description: A dark and mysterious shield that pulses with power.

items.description: A heater shield made of light yet rock hard red clay engraved with intricate knot patterns.

items.name: Fyrebrand Shield
items.description: This shield bears a shimmering red pattern of eternal smoldering steel.

items.name: Hero's Guard
items.description: A mighty warrior's shield that has seen many victories over its lifetime.

items.name: Lightning Etched Shield
items.description: Evidently lightning does strike twice.

items.name: Massive Shield
items.description: An oversized magical shield. It is ideal for front line fighters.

items.name: morrowtear shield
items.description: This elegantly crafted shield bears an intricately carved pattern that has been overlaid with watery crystal.

items.name: Morrowtear Shield
items.description: This elegantly crafted shield bears an intricately carved pattern that has been overlaid with watery crystal.

items.name: Pinelash Shield
items.description: Defenders of the deep forests often employ this shield of green tinted steel.

items.name: Runestone Shield
items.description: This shield is forged from a brilliant white metallic ore and is inscribed with runes of faith and power.

items.name: Ancient Pine Shield
items.description: A reinforced magical shield.

items.name: Black Blazoned Shield
items.description: A black tear shield blazoned with an unknown heraldic symbol.

items.name: Drakeback Shield
items.description: A magical shield, it has been covered in drake scales.

items.name: Firedweller's Heater Shield
items.description: Flames flicker across the surface of this heater shield as if the fire is trapped within the metal itself.

items.name: Marr's Armguard
items.description: A small shield blessed by Mithaniel Marr.

items.name: Morrowfyre Defender
items.description: This ancient shield, forged from black steel and plated with obsidian and shale, bears arcane runes of eternal molten silver.

items.name: Murkwood Shield
items.description: This shield is made from the bark of a murkwood.

items.name: Radiant Shield
items.description: This shield is radiating a soft white light.

items.name: Holdfast
items.description: Its inscription reads: to protect the weak, one must sacrifice all.

items.name: Protectorate Shield
items.description: This shield seems to have some symbol on it that is not familiar.

items.name: Torkark's Tower
items.description: A magical tower shield once belonging to the dread warlord Jorkus Torkark.

items.name: Tundra Vanguard
items.description: A magical shield, it has been fashioned from the hide of a tundra dwelling animal.

items.name: Tear of Marr
items.description: A magical shield crafted for the clergy of Marr, many have been lost over the years.

items.name: Whalebone Shield
items.description: A shield crafted from the bones of a whale.

items.name: Enveloped Shield
items.description: The beauty of this shield evokes a radiance that can be felt by its bearer

items.name: Starmetal Shield
items.description: A heavy shield crafted from meteoric iron fallen from the sky.

items.name: Battleworn Shield
items.description: This shield has been through many battles.

items.name: Desert Tear
items.description: A magical shield, it offers added protection from poison and disease.

items.name: Fossilized Mud Shield
items.description: This shield, once soft and malleable is now harder than stone.

items.name: Iced Iron Tower Shield
items.description: A strong tower shield crafted from iced iron.

items.name: Pinebark Shield
items.description: A magical shield crafted from the bark of an ancient pine tree.

items.name: Runestone Tower Shield
items.description: This shield is forged from a brilliant white metallic ore and is inscribed with runes of faith and power.

items.name: Tundrashell
items.description: A mythical shield of the northlands, it has been lost for many years.

items.name: Butterfly Winged Shield
items.description: This shield has small butterflies painted on the arm.

items.name: Frog Skin Shield
items.description: This shield has been crafted from the hides of giant frogs.

items.name: Transcendent Shield
items.description: This shield seems too beautiful to be real. You can feel its power just being near it.

items.name: Blessed Shield
items.description: This shield has a sense of divine power.

items.name: Enoob's Shield
items.description: A shield that the mighty cyclops Enoob had made from a fierce lion he slain.

items.name: Nitefyre Shield
items.description: This shield bears a shimmering red pattern of eternal smoldering steel.

items.name: Shield of Iron
items.description: A massive shield made from iron.

items.name: Unholy Shield of War
items.description: A massive shield that's only purpose in existence is war.

items.name: Chikitawa Shield
items.description: This heavy tear shield is made by the chikitawa pack.

items.description: A magical shield once carried by the legendary knight, Danlon.

items.description: A wooden shield crafted only from oak trees found within the heart of the Glinaldal Forest.

items.name: High Priest's Tower
items.description: A shield filled with magical energies from a high priest.

items.description: A shield crafted by the elves of lore for Hael Nebur. It has flowers etched all around the border.

items.name: Shield of the Elders
items.description: A shield made from the core of an ancient treant.

items.name: Starfire Shield
items.description: This shield has been crafted from starfire.

items.name: Abysmal Shield
items.description: Terrifying heads have been crafted into the center of this shield.

items.name: Mystic Centaurian Protector
items.description: The centaurian seer, Houghdrin, crafted these shields. Though Houghdrin is gone, the shields' power remains strong.

items.name: Rallosian Battle Shield
items.description: This shield, crafted by orcs and enchanted by ogre mystics, bears an intricate carving of a brutal battle between orcs and men.

items.name: Rallosian War Shield
items.description: This shield, forged by orcish warlords and blessed by the magics of the ogre mystics, was used to defend the Rallosian Empire.

items.name: Shield of the Protector
items.description: A light and strong shield made especially for those that do not have overwhelming strength.

items.name: Verdusin Shield
items.description: This shield is filled with the power of Verdusin, a legendary ranger.

items.name: Iceguard
items.description: A magical shield crafted in the arctic northlands.

items.name: shield of amethyst
items.description: A shield that used to guard an arch mage.

items.name: Shield of Amethyst
items.description: A shield that used to guard an arch mage.

items.name: Silver Crested Shield
items.description: A shield made from steel and crested with a silver cross with a serpent winding up it.

items.name: Stonefyre Shield
items.description: This shield bears a shimmering red pattern of eternal smoldering steel.

items.name: Swampgard
items.description: One must be on guard at all times in the swamp.

items.name: Icemight Tower
items.description: The fabled shield of Drognar Icemight, it is credited to his great victory over the freezeblood horde.

items.name: Incandescent Shield
items.description: This shield is glowing with a white light. You can feel the power of this item just being near it.

items.name: Shield of the Martyr
items.description: A relic from before recorded time. Legend says that the mortal Mithaniel Marr used this shield.

items.name: Vortex Protector
items.description: A magical heater shield.

items.name: Aurabound Shield
items.description: This shield is bound in a light blue aura. Its power can be felt when worn.

items.name: Divine Shield
items.description: You can feel the power that resonates within this blessed tower shield.

items.name: Mystic Shield of Night
items.description: Legends say that a northman forged this wepaon after gaining the knowledge to do so from the nightwalking spirits.

items.name: Raven Crested Shield
items.description: The feather of a raven, which has been guilded in a mixture of blood and silver, adorns this shield.

items.name: wyrm wing shield
items.description: A shield crafted from the flexible yet extremely durable wing of a wyrm.

items.name: Dragon Hide Shield
